mapper.sql: r.relation_id, r.name, r.avatar, r.phone, r.wechat, r.email, r.relation_type, r.company, r.customer_id, linked_customer.company_name AS customer_name, r.remark, r.source, r.source_customer_id, source_customer.company_name AS source_customer_name, r.source_contact_id, r.create_user_id, r.create_time, r.update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM crm_relation r LEFT JOIN crm_customer linked_customer ON r.customer_id = linked_customer.customer_id LEFT JOIN crm_customer source_customer ON r.source_customer_id = source_customer.customer_id WHERE r.relation_id = #{relationId} AND r.create_user_id = #{ownerUserId} AND r.status = 1
